images.alt: A striking digital portrait of a woman named Jacklyn Jax embodying a “Star Juniper” persona—fierce, emotionally charged, and on the edge of controlled fury. Her expression is intense and volatile, eyes glowing with restrained anger and vulnerability, as if caught mid-breakdown or transformation. The scene is layered with digital glitch artifacts: chromatic aberration, pixel tearing, datamosh streaks, and fragmented overlays that distort parts of her face and body. Motion blur trails her movements, creating a ghosted double-exposure effect, like multiple emotional states colliding. Her styling blends futuristic and organic elements—cosmic textures, deep purples, electric blues, and neon greens reminiscent of juniper tones and starfields. Lighting is harsh and directional with flickering highlights, as if the environment itself is unstable. Background is abstract and digital—shifting gradients, broken signal noise, and collapsing UI fragments. Ultra-detailed, cinematic, high contrast, emotional chaos meets cyberpunk elegance, square or portrait composition.

images.alt: A tongue-in-cheek illustrated infographic titled “Recipe for Disaster,” designed as a vintage kitchen poster with dark humor and ironic tone. Highly detailed hand-drawn illustrations in an old engraving / retro cookbook style on aged parchment paper. Layout includes clearly labeled sections: “Ingredients,” “Instructions,” “Equipment,” and “Warning.” Ingredients feature absurd concepts like ego, ignorance, impulsiveness, denial, poor planning, and narcissism, each depicted as literal objects (measuring cups, jars, labeled bags). Step-by-step instructions shown in comic-style panels with small captions, demonstrating humorous actions like mixing “ego and ignorance,” seasoning with denial, and baking chaos in an oven. Include visual gags such as rose-colored glasses, blindfolds, “I’m the expert” jar, and a burnt cake labeled “disaster.” Add small handwritten notes, sarcastic commentary, and ironic warnings at the bottom. Composition is symmetrical, poster-like, with bold vintage typography, sepia tones, crosshatching, fine linework, and subtle textures. Dark comedy, highly detailed, whimsical but cynical, 4K resolution, print-quality infographic design.

Generative artificial intelligence-driven chatbots and medical misinformation: an accuracy, referencing and readability audit 
bmjopen.bmj.com/content/16/4...

【生成AIチャットボットと医療誤情報】 Gemini、DeepSeek、Meta AI、ChatGPT、Grokの5種に医療・健康系質問250問を投げた監査研究（BMJ Open, 2026）。 結果：約半数（49.6%）の回答が「問題あり」と判定。引用文献の正確性の中央値はわずか40%で、完全な参照文献リストはゼロ。可読性は全モデルで大学水準。拒否はたった2件（0.8%）のみ。 AIで健康情報を調べる前に、リテラシー教育と規制整備が急務です。 #誤情報 #AIリテラシー #医療AI #HealthMisinformation #GenerativeAI

11月10日(火)-12日(木)に、 #IEEE と IEE Electronics Packaging Society #EPS が “15th IEEE #CPMT Symposium Japan” #ICSJ2026 を開催。テーマは “Challenge of Advanced Packaging for AI / Data Center and its Utilization Technology”。京都市中京区・立命館大学にて。アブストラクト投稿締切は5月29日。詳細は buff.ly/OjgkevN に。
 #Symposium #ElectronicPackaging

6月3日(水)13:00-17:15に、エレクトロニクス実装学会 #JIEP 生成AI実装技術研究会 (前年度までのインテリジェント実装技術研究会) が公開研究会『生成AIの実務への活用ハンズオン “組織内にデータ隠蔽する実例紹介”』を開催。東京都杉並区・回路会館およびオンラインにて。詳細は buff.ly/u2OIUSU に。
 #Seminar #GenerativeAI

5月28日(木)13:30~16:45に、日本実装技術振興協会 #JJTTA が第238回定例講演会『実装技術と人工知能およびパワーデバイスの開発動向』を開催。川崎市幸区・川崎市産業振興会館およびオンラインにて。講演5件。講演会後に技術交流会。詳細は buff.ly/kD85XLQ に。
